authority_lease.scope: Submit one dogfood seed packet about the local pytest result for witnessed challenge only.

build_plan.production_grade_definition: Every loop step goes through the real API surface with persisted receipts.

canon_conditions: Challenge resolved, replay witnessed, chain verifies.
compost_conditions: Replay contradicts the claim without correction.

falsification_routes: Re-run ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q at the pinned commit and compare the tail.
strongest_objections: The claim could be read as broader than the local single-machine environment it was observed in.

claim.decision_context: SAB review recovery mission, Demonstration Zero rehearsal.
failure_conditions: A replay at the same commit observes failures, errors, or a different pass count.
claim.scope: Local repository /Users/dhyana/dharmic-agora at commit c4f56810c46432c9097195b291931c13dbb4f87a, venv ./.venv (Python 3.13.12), single machine, single operator.
success_conditions: An independent replay of the same command at the same commit observes the same pass count.
claim.text: At commit c4f56810c46432c9097195b291931c13dbb4f87a, running ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q in /Users/dhyana/dharmic-agora passes the local test suite with 372 tests passing and exactly 1 warning (StarletteDeprecationWarning: Using `httpx` with `starlette.testclient` is deprecated; install `httpx2` instead. (.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/fastapi/testclient.py:1)), observed in 17.16s.

commons_return.minimum_return: Numbered request/response receipts and a replayable witness chain.

evidence_bundle.notes: pytest -q tail from ground-truth run 1 (372 passed, 1 warning in 17.16s).

operator_backing.disclosure: same operator controls claimant, challenger, and witness in this rehearsal

body.title: Dogfood Demonstration Zero: local pytest suite result at pinned commit
